narrative:
Lynchburg (precinct in Highland County) has 959 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.4 percentage points.
